name: Political
description: Political candidates, ballot measures, issue advocacy. Campaigns promoting political positions, candidates, or legislative issues.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US FEC Disclaimer Requirements
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Political ads must include 'paid for by' disclaimers. State-level AI disclosure laws increasingly require disclosure of AI-generated content in political ads.

regulatory_frameworks.name: EU DSA Political Ad Transparency
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Political advertising requires transparency about funding, targeting criteria, and reach. EU DSA Article 26 prohibits targeting on special categories for political ads.

guidance: Many jurisdictions require ad libraries and targeting disclosure for political advertising. EU DSA Article 26 specifically prohibits targeting political ads using GDPR Article 9 special categories.
